title: PlayPosit Issues (For a handful of students)
content:
Hi Everyone,

There is a PlayPosit issue affecting a small handful of students. (Ignore this if you are not having problems with your PlayPosit synching)

The video will either not submit, or submit late. PlayPosit has been trouble shooting this and the grading will be corrected before the end of the semester. 

ADVICE: If you get an synch error after watching the video, do not try to force a synch. I can manually synch on my end, which prevents additional problems. 
I hope to have this figured out by the Fall break! 

Best,

Jeremiah
